$comment: Design token file for the Notification Action component
$description: CTA button group embedded inside a Notification row. Supports a Single button (ghost outline) or Double buttons (filled primary + ghost outline side by side). The component ships in two sizes: sm (compact 32px, used in the standalone atom) and md (default, used when embedded inside a Notification card with a 20px slot icon on each side of the label).

gap.description: 8px gap between the two buttons in the Double variant

height.description: 32px fixed height — compact variant shown in the standalone Notification Action component

horizontal.description: Left and right inset on compact buttons

vertical.description: Top and bottom inset on compact buttons

gap.description: 8px gap between icon slot and label text inside the button

border-radius.description: 8px corner radius — default size used when the action is embedded inside a Notification card

horizontal.description: Left and right inset on default-size buttons

vertical.description: 8px top and bottom inset on default-size buttons

gap.description: 8px gap between icon slot and label text inside the button

size.description: 20px — placeholder icon slot rendered on each side of the button label

background.description: White background for the ghost/outline button style — used for the Single action and the second button in Double

color.description: #84adff — light primary blue border on the ghost action button
#004eeb — primary blue label text on the ghost action button

background.description: #155eef — filled primary blue background for the first button in Double variant

width.description: Border matches background to maintain consistent layout

color.description: #155eef — border matches fill in the primary button style
White label on the filled primary button

shadow.description: 0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) — applied to both ghost and primary button styles
